allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('vue:', p['dependencies'].get\('vue',''\)\); print\('element-plus:', p['dependencies'].get\('element-plus',''\)\); print\('echarts:', p['dependencies'].get\('echarts',''\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in {**p.get\('dependencies',{}\),**p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\)]")
